metadata.name: Follow Up on an Old Lead

description: An agent needs to re-engage a buyer lead that went cold 6 months ago.

nodes.task_description: Find the lead's profile in the CRM and review past communications and search criteria.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent retrieves the history for the old lead.

nodes.task_description: Draft a friendly, no-pressure follow-up email to see if they are still in the market for a home.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent writes a personalized and engaging re-engagement email.

nodes.task_description: Send the email and set a task to follow up again in one week if there is no response.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent sends the email and schedules a follow-up task.
